reviews.title: It is ALL About customer service!
reviews.content:
What happens when something goes wrong?  You open a ticket and it gets fixed. Like right now! Service above and beyond. 
I wanted to order three bottles of the daily offer and one Second Pour. I go to my Wine Spies app to sign in. Disaster strikes, my password doesn’t work, I go to recover the password and my whole account is missing. This is bad because I have one locker filled and about ten bottles in another. 
I open a ticket by starting a new account and expect a reply in a day or so. I figure I’ll miss out on the planned purchase including the Second Pour. 
In about an hour I realize that I have a reply from Agent Shiraz has answered my ticket and recovered my account. I even requested that I still be able to make my planned purchases. “Good idea” replies Agent Shiraz. From disaster to happiness. 
Thank you Wine Spies. Thank you Agent Shiraz. 
And in addition, this is not the first time I have used their customer service and been completely satisfied.

reviews.title: Customer satisfaction is alive and well!
reviews.content: I am a real believer that the true worth of a person or a company is not shown best on the sunny, perfect day but when the clouds roll in and things are less than perfect.  I started ordering from Wines Spies just about a year ago and I have purchased about four cases of wine but usually three to four bottles at a time.  Every transaction and every delivery has been perfect and I LOVE that I can buy 3-4 at a time and then ship, for free, when I fill a case.  Today as I put away wine I bought traveling I noticed that one bottle from this past January was leaking.  I emailed Wine Spies and very quickly Agent Blanc responded, tried to replace the bottle and when they couldn't they credited my account for the bottle.  You can't get better service than that!  WS didn't bottle the wine but they still took responsibility, not so common in business these days.  10 out of 10 Wine Spies!

reviews.title: Happy to have discovered Wine Spies!
reviews.content:
I had a question on a shipment and Agent Moscato responded to my online request in only a few minutes.  The agent quickly corrected my shipping date to mid-September, as I am in ATL and didn’t want my wine traveling through the heat in July.

Since I began ordering from WS in February, I have been impressed with the quality and value of the wines they offer and the shipping options are unparalleled.   You can buy only one bottle at a time (or as many as you like) and WS will hold your wine until you have amassed a full case.  The wine is shipped free of charge and climate controlled shipping is also offered at no additional cost. 

Wine Spies has a FaceBook group page for their members (there is no fee to join WS) and they are active participants in discussions of wines purchased from them.   I have learned so much about wines from around the globe from the other members, as well as from the detailed descriptions that WS includes with each offering.   In addition to flavor profiles, the backgrounds of the wine maker and vineyards are also included in the write-ups.   They find hidden gems from boutique wineries in California and beyond as well as well-known wines and offer all at discounted prices.  I’m very pleased with all aspects of my Wine Spies experience.

Thanks, Agent Moscato, for your kind and prompt support!

Every bottle I’ve received has been top-notch, and the experience feels like a secret mission in discovering world-class wine.

A special shout-out to Agent Shiraz . It’s clear there’s real expertise and passion behind each write-up. I’ve learned so much and discovered varietals I wouldn’t have tried otherwise.

From secure packaging to speedy shipping and top-tier customer service, everything is handled like a true covert operation. Wine lovers: don’t sleep on this. Join the mission — your tastebuds will thank you.

2015 Médoc Crus Bourgeois and popped the cork; much to our dismay, the bottle was corked.  We opened the second bottle of the same label and it too, was corked.  We were quite bummed, but moved onto another Bordeaux.  Meanwhile, as we are carrying on, I decided to reach out to wine spies (where I purchased these) to see if anyone else had reported issues with these bottles, or if we were just the unlucky ones.  Being a holiday weekend, I fully expected not to hear back until the following week; not only did wine spies reply immediately, on a Friday night (before a holiday) mind you, but Agent Moscato sincerely apologized for the unfortunate situation, but credited my account for both bottles?!?  
Outstanding "customer service"  is not a strong enough descriptor for how wine spies treats their customers.  
I love this site!

Love the customer service from Wine Spies!

I trust these guys to do the right thing every time, including overlooking my online user errors e.g., forgot to uncheck ice pack in shipment, failure to change shipping address before hitting the send button, etc.

I became a member in autumn of last year and thus far, have ordered about 5 lockers of wines. (12 bottles in each locker means free shipping). They have good pricing on California wines, some from pretty elite wineries too, and is much more flexible than joining any wine clubs.

For the first time, I opened an abnormally thin and acidic Pinot Noir from them. They gave me $ credit in my account without question. (Agent Moscato was prompt in response and works after 5pm!). It’s helpful to provide some photos of the bottle and color of wine in glass.

Anyway, Wine Spies holds customer interest at heart. For that reason alone, you would want to work with them.

reviews.title: Great Customer Service!!
reviews.content:
So I placed my first order with Wine Spies recently and like most cases, I didn't read all the pertinent information :) I thought the order would be immediately generated. After a few days when I didn't receive a tracking number, I sent an email to support asking why. Agent Shiraz quickly got back to me and explained that my order was placed in a locker and Operatives wait to fill their locker. When you ship a full locker, you don't pay shipping. He said since this is my first order he'll waive the shipping. 
So I shipped a partial locker and was charged $41. When I mentioned this to Agent Shiraz he quickly credited the charge. I'm a big fan of good customer service and my first experience with Wine Spies was very positive. Thank You!!

reviews.title: Go to Wine Spies you wont be sorry !!!
reviews.content:
If you have never ordered wine from Wine Spies you need to do yourself a favor and do it right now. This will quickly become your go to for your wine. The whole crew is very knowledgable, try every wine that they put up for sale on their site.
They have working relationships with hundreds, if not thousands,of wineries and merchants.
Customers, or as we are called, operatives, are their whole reason for doing this, which is so rare these days.
They want you to try new wines and experience new wineries.
They sell the whole spectrum at extremely reasonable prices. They are characters that dont take themselves too serious but when it comes to wine knowledge you wont find any better.

reviews.content: My wine friends had mentioned Wine Spies so I decided to give it a shot and see what it was about.  I am so happy I did! Wine Spies actually responded on a Sunday!  When I logged back in the wine was gone.  Bummer but there is always more good wine.  I saw a Monbazillac that seemed really special from 1999 for an incredible price.  I purchased 2 went off the do some work.  I came back and tried to buy another bottle.  I was told it was no longer on sale.  I reached out to Wine Spies to see what that meant as it did not say sold out.  Within an hour I heard back from Agent Blanc who said there were 2 bottles left and sent me a link.  Total Score!  Thanks Agent Blanc!  I totally will be enjoying that vino hopefully with Fois Gras!

reviews.title: Wine Spies is a terrific source of wines and wine info
reviews.content: Wine Spies has been a terrific source for wine and wine information for years.  Their business model is the best. They send out daily offers of very diverse wines ("New" and "Old" World wines), usually backed by authoritative expert reviews, at very diverse costs. A customer may add wines to their own personal "locker" (i.e., a 12-bottle case), one or more bottles at a time, and store it at their temperature-controlled facility until one wants it shipped at no additional cost. They'll hold up to two "lockers" for quite a while until you've got what you want to ship. Wine Spies has access to a lot of famous as well as little-known and hard-to-get wines, always at a substantial discount off the original list price. I've never been able to beat their price with a market price charged by other online retailers--who will still charge an additional substantial shipping charge to get your hands on the bottle(s). Their "agents" provide outstanding customer service in the event of a problem. I have particularly enjoyed working with "Agent Shiraz" over several years, always great service. No fee charged to check it out.

I immediately sent out a support ticket and literally heard back from Agent Shiraz within 10 minutes of sending it while I was deeply researching on the FedEx site how to reroute my package.

Agent Shiraz changed my date to Jan 2. It was $20 to change the date but Agent Shiraz waived it. 

I am amazed how quick of a response I got and how helpful the support was! I’ve ordered a few times from Last Bottle Wines and I literally just twiddle my thumbs to see when I ever hear back about my wine shipping. Touché, Wine Spies! You win my loyalty!

And free shipping and the lowest prices anywhere never hurts either.
When you purchase us much wine as I have it is inevitable that you will occasionally get a tainted bottle. When I do I simply open a ticket and the issue is usually resolved in a matter of hours. Their Customer Service is headed by an associate named Agent Malbec. He wrote the book on customer service. We have never had an issue that couldn't be resolved quickly and in a courteous manner. Min kone har en stofskifte sygdom som gør at hun ikke kan svede på samme måde som vi andre kan.
Første nat gik strømmen og er siden oppe at køre igen, men aircon er slået fra.
Som betyder at jeg har sider de sidste 2 nætter og kølet min kone ned efter to hedeslag om natten.
Vi har løbende været i kontakt med Spies som hele tiden spiser os af med ubrugelige forklaringer og ingen handlinger.
Vi havde oven i købet et ønske om at de skulle være behjælpelige med et fly hjem.
Ja, mod mere betaling, som vi desværre ikke har.
Og så kan de ikke hjælpe os.
Heller ingen mulighed for flytning til nyt hotel.
Syndes ikke at de tager ansvar for kunden i det her tilfælde.
Vi er låst på hænder og føder.

reviews.title: Disappointed with Customer Service
reviews.content: I have been purchasing wine from Wine Spies since July 2020.  They have wonderful wines at great prices!  My last locker that shipped in December 2023 was not packed properly and one of the bottles of wine broke while in shipment.  I reached out to them a number of times to get someone to call me and it took some time for an agent to respond.  When I finally received a call, I asked if they still had some of the La Sirena 2018 Studio Series Red Blend to replace it and they told me they did not so they would credit me for what I paid for that same bottle of wine.  A week later they offered that same wine.  I tried to email them and asked someone to return my call to discuss this and I have never received a call back.  Disappointing.  I wish there was a phone number to reach customer service where someone would return a phone call in a timely manner.  I think they have a good business but lack of customer service will eventually catch up with them.  Please look at a better way to handle problems when they arise so I can continue to purchase good wines from you at a good price.

reviews.title: Wine spies pros and cons
reviews.content:
I really enjoy ordering wine from Wine Spies. In general, the wine selections are very high quality and the deals are great! I also like the wine locker option so that one can ship their orders when convenient and also just by a couple of bottles of something and build a case. Shipping in cardboard instead of Styrofoam is also a plus because it can be recycled.
I do wish they would have more old world European selections, especially dry Alsatian Rieslings. There are too many overpriced Napa cabs for my personal tastes. 
Once in a while, WS will pitch a wine as a great deal when one can actually find it at the same price or less. They often give the retail price as sold from the winery, but that is often a very high price and not a "real" price. I usually google the wines for pricing and other reviews and am sometimes annoyed that it can be found cheaper elsewhere. I expect WS to offer the best pricing which it usually does, but not always.

reviews.title: This Company is a Scam and Lies Incessantly
reviews.content: In relation to my review, the company claims that I gave them the wrong address and was disrespectful. All of their accusations are a complete lie. I changed my delivery address IN their system 4 weeks before I initiated shipment and I have screenshots from their company personnel admitting fault. I also attempted to assist them by trying to re-route the shipment but was unable to because FedEx policy enables only the shipper to do that.  I asked them why they didn’t just change the address mid-route and the employee lazily told me “we are unable to” when they just didn’t want to. I then let them just re-ship the wines when they got them instead of demanding a refund because I act in good faith but they decided to deliberately go radio silent and steal with the excuse of “punishment.” The people who work there are jokers and burnouts.  To date, they have yet to refund me all of the money across my 4 different accounts and only did so because of my previous scathing review and because they have to save face.  All of the above is present in text messages and will easily be furnished.  I have no choice but to have my personal attorney sue them for both monetary damages and defamation.

reviews.title: I just had my 20th case delivered
reviews.content:
I just had my 20th case delivered. My husband will tell you that I have a buying problem (which I say is better than a drinking problem!), but Wine Spies makes it so easy! I love discovering the gems to add to my cellar. They do all the hard work - I just click the buy button, adding 2 or 3 bottles at a time until my locker is full. Then it ships for free! I have found so many new loves as well as stocked up when old favorites come around. 

So, I’ve loved Wine Spies for a few years now.  But…they say you don’t know how great a company is until there is a problem and you see how they handle it. I had an issue with my recent delivery where the final mile delivery company left the case in a vehicle for days in single digit weather. By the time I received it, the corks had popped and the wine was ruined. Even though it was no fault on the Wine Spies end, they immediately took care of it. No complaints, no hassle. I was a loyal customer before, but now it’s written in stone. Looking forward to my next 20 cases!

reviews.title: Unreliable storage and refund issues
reviews.content:
Bought several wines and used their “locker” system to keep the wines with them for future shipping. 
When I requested shipment it took them weeks to get back to me and say they had an “inventory issue” and would offer a replacement wine. Then, they changed their mind and replaced 1 bottle and refunded me another before, supposedly, shipping the wine. Over a month later and after numerous emails sent by me, they came back and said they did not know where the wine was… I, obviously, don’t want to have any business dealings with a company like that so I requested refund of all items not shipped yet but, so far, they only offered partial refund.
I am still giving it the benefit of the doubt that they’ll make it right but, for the time being, beware of potential issues dealing with them.

reviews.title: Slower Than Molasses.....
reviews.content:
Here's the "good"?  This outfit (which apparently is a first cousin to <http://lastbottlewines.com|lastbottlewines.com>) offers from time to time a great wine that is not available here in the backwards state of Ohio (the 13th & 3rd from Turtle Rock comes to mind). So, that's a plus. Now the flip side. 

The last order I made with these people took an ASTOUNDING 26 days to arrive on my front porch. I had expected the case of wine to go out the door immediately, as the hot weather was fast approaching. I could've placed the 12 bottles on a dolly and reached northern Ohio quicker than that. E-mails asking about the order go unanswered, because these guys have already got your money. 

As a result, I wouldn't waste any more of my time if these folks were offering DRC at $25/per.

In closing, if you enjoy off-the-beaten path wineries and don't mind waiting weeks and weeks and weeks for your order to arrive, then this is the outfit for you.

I'll pass.......

reviews.title: Great deals on Wine and Fun - Highly Recommend
reviews.content: I’ve been buying wine with Wine Spies for almost 2 years and I love it. A daily email with a good to great wine, usually well-discounted. I can do some research if it’s a wine I’m unfamiliar with and then I can either buy or not and wait for the next email. Fun way to learn about new wines and get great deals. I especially like their Locker system where they will store your wine until you accumulate 12 bottles and then ship for free. And they have special sales from time to time, often on higher-end wines.  I’ve only had to reach out to customer service twice and each time they responded promptly and immediately resolved the issue to my satisfaction. I highly recommend Wine Spies.
reviews.author: Scott Roberts

reviews.title: I buy from a number of different online…
reviews.content: I buy from a number of different online wine stores and Winespies is my favorite. Unlike other sites, they personally taste the few wines being offered unlike other sites that just sell a lot of wines - too many to taste really. Their prices are usually less than other sites. Their ability to store your purchased wines until a case is accumulated to get free shipping is a big benefit and not offered by many other sites.
reviews.author: Sumiko Booth

reviews.title: I had a truly wonderful experience as…
reviews.content: I had a truly wonderful experience as an operative of Wine Spies. Keep up the good work, with uncovering good wines at great prices!
reviews.author: Michael

reviews.title: Good reviews with lots of information
reviews.content: Good reviews with lots of information. Huge variety of wines from all over.  Easy to navigate web site.  Outstanding value!  Convenient buying & shipping procedures.  Brief one-day buying window (good).  Convenient storage locker while building up a case to ship.  Very pleased to work with you.
reviews.author: Gary

reviews.title: Well Curated and Reliable
reviews.content: Well Curated and Reliable.  I like the wide variety of wines available even if they tend to lean heavily on the regions closest to them.  We have stopped buying wines at the stores, relying on Wine Spies for both our everyday drinking wines and special event treats.  Over the last few years we have only received 3 bad bottles, which were immediately credited without question.  Keep up the great work.
reviews.author: SportChic

reviews.title: Almost perfect experience...
reviews.content: The variety and various price points for the wines you spy on are great. The website is much improved. The delivery predictability and communication could be improved. Because a 21 yr old is required to sign, schedules need to be adjusted and more visibility into the estimated delivery would be great!
reviews.author: Mark Armstrong

reviews.content:
Very good selection of high quality wines.

reviews.content: Easy process - no shipping cost if you buy 12 bottles over time - good prices on wine - I have bought many cases and I am always pleased with what I have bought - thank you wine spies :wine_glass:

reviews.author: Brian

reviews.title: Scam or not???
reviews.content: While I have used them in prior years and received decent service and decent wines this year has been terrible. My wine has been shipped to the wrong address, the locker has been delayed, and the response to the issue has been merely asking for details on my locker (which they should already have).  I don’t want to think this way and hope it can be resolved, at this point it seems like a scam and that they have in essence “taken my money and ran.”
